title: Return Policy
intro: This is a general return policy page for the MNMKNK platform. Detailed policies may vary from store to store depending on the nature of products and store terms.
s1Content: The return policy aims to clarify your rights and options when there's an issue with an order. Return and exchange details may vary by store.
s2Content: Returns are typically accepted for products in their original condition, unused, with receipt/proof of purchase and within the timeframe specified by the store.
s3Content: Some products may not be returnable, such as opened consumables, customized products, or any product specified by the store in its terms.
s4Title: How to Submit a Return Request
s4Content: You can contact the store directly through the available contact methods on the store page (such as phone or WhatsApp) to initiate a return request, and the store will inform you of the steps.
s5Content: If a return is accepted, the refund mechanism varies depending on the payment method and store policy. Refunds may take several business days.
